description: Create a GitLab CI configuration that includes the external file standard.yml and sets preferences.skip_indicatives to 0. Define a topics list containing several entries: A0 with conf ratiolevels, floor 0, format '%{code} : %{message}' and question pattern A-*, A with conf pclevels and questions A*, B with decimalspc 2 and questions '*B*', Bi with decimalspc 2, excluded questions B-2 and B-4 and question pattern B-*, and M with decimalspc 2 and regex '^.*M.*'. No stages, jobs, scripts, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are specified in this pipeline.
